Profile.nme: No Root Screen Off Data Enabled
No Root Screen Off BT Disconnected
Bottom "Buffer" Profile. Not To Be Used
screen On No Lock No Low Power

Vals.Title: .*([Ff]inish|[Cc]omplete|[Dd]one).*
Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.extras.VARI: InterceptApps Title Text InterceptPersistent CategoryName plugininstanceid plugintypeid

Share.d:
You can check the status of the mobile data with this task: ON or OFF.
Notes: - If the name of the Custom Setting (also table) is different, customize it using the one for your device.

Profile.pc: at boot, disable any & all global var & settings toggling profiles, check conditions & set global variables accordingly

Profile.nme: (Un)Set Sim Presence Airplane Mode via Automate

Condition.rhs: .*(Net Set \(User\)|Wan Check Switch|Ping Test|Redundant Net Src).*

Profile.nme: Mobile Data Var Set via Automate

Share.d:
You can check the status of the mobile data with this task: ON or OFF.
Notes: - If the name of the Custom Setting (also table) is different, customize it using the one for your device.

Action.label: stop if change to ssid & iface is rejected
when settings stat says wan is reachable
when settings stat says wan is unreachable

Action.Str: wan iface switch count limit reached
wan iface switch count limit reached
wan iface switch count limit reached

Action.label: prompt to ask to stop WAN checker if switch count is more than 4 & wan is stable

Action.Str: WAN switch toggle count reset to 0
WAN src disabled: stopping wan checker

Action.label: switch ssid if selected "yes" from above prompt & then check the wan system stat again (the goto action at action 12)

Action.Str: Net Set,Net Unset,Net Src Disconnected Switch,Wan Check Switch,Ping Test

Action.label: audio dbg
audio dbg

Action.Str: Net Set (User),Net Set,Wan Check Switch,Ping Test,Net Src Disconnected Switch,Redundant Net Src,Net Unset,Bluetooth Set,Bluetooth Unset
Net Set (User),Net Set,Wan Check Switch,Ping Test,Net Src Disconnected Switch,Redundant Net Src,Net Unset,Bluetooth Set,Bluetooth Unset
dir_path=/storage/emulated/0/Tasker/log for i in runlog tasker do for j in log txt do [ -f $dir_path/$i.$j ] && echo > $dir_path/$i.$j [ $dir_path/$i.$j.1 ] && rm -f $dir_path/$i.$j.1 done done

Action.label: toggle for when the profile's active but the task isn't running (yes it's happened a couple of times)

Action.Str: bg loc flag set & loc enabled

Action.label: don't act on anything data when sim is either not in ready state or not present

Action.Str: Cannot toggle data. Airplane mode enabled

Action.label: toggle data from tasker's action if root, shizuku or tasker settings work
go ui mode if conditions no root or tasker settings don't work

Action.Str: Switch screen on to disable data
No Root Screen Off Data Enabled
No root. Cannot set cpu settings
All cores set to max freq & perf gov
All cores set to max freq & perf gov

Action.label: to not continue setting anything cpu if the 1st cpu action fails

Action.Str: No root. Cannot set cpu settings
All cores set to schedutil gov & P cores to min freq

Action.label: to not continue setting anything cpu if the 1st cpu action fails

Action.Str: pause_time%null()s to go back to that app or until WAN connection before being prompted
Redundant Net Src,Wan Check Switch,Ping Test,Net Src Disconnected Switch
Redundant Net Src,Wan Check Switch,Ping Test,Net Src Disconnected Switch

Action.label: set incoming intent with payload of multiple keys as local variables

Action.Str: Net Src Disconnected Switch,Wan Check Switch,Ping Test
fg loc flag set & loc enabled

Action.label: Google maps - Select search bar if auto ui query returns an existing one
waze - Select search bar if auto ui query returns an existing one
save bluetooth state before setting airplane mode
get sim presence via shell

Action.Str: No root. Cannot set cpu settings
All cores set to schedutil gov & P cores to min freq

Action.label: to not continue setting anything cpu if the 1st cpu action fails

Action.Str: Tasker initializing lazy workflow at boot

Action.label: check root
check if work profile exists & set it's state as flags
Tasker - Check Set boot stuff (Automate flo)
disable gaming profile & try the disable sensors toggle (if no root)

Action.Str: No root bin found. Disabled profiles needing root

Action.label: disable sensors (test)
disable gaming profile & try the disable sensors toggle (if no root)
set wan flags to negative if no wifi connection

Action.Str: disable sensor cannot be toggled. need privileges (root, shizuku) or adb

Action.label: enable gaming profile if root

Action.Str: Tasker - lazy workflow at boot initialized

Action.label: check if tasker settings is installed
set flag values for tasker settings app to "not_installed". so tasker settings way is not used

Action.Str: Tasker - lazy workflow at boot initialized

Action.label: set flag values for tasker settings app to tell the workflow if tasker settings way can/is to be used when no root for cellular data
same as action 69 but for bluetooth

Action.Str: Tasker - lazy workflow at boot initialized

Action.label: flag values set at boot or at import

Action.Str: %app_name set app to trigger net/map profiles? (pkg - %pkg_name)
Set installed app %installed_app_name in the relevant/needed (net/bluetooth/map) profile's app context of needed (pkg - %installed_pkg_name)
%installed_app_name installed, consists of requests for %str. set app in tasker lazy workflow project if needed
Ping values unset. Stopped ping test
No Root Screen Off BT Disconnected
No Root Screen Off BT Disconnected

Action.label: no shizuku, root, sdk lvl > 31 & tasker settings don't work. do the ui way
tasker toggle if shizuku/root available, taskersettings work or sdk lvl < 32

Action.Str: %BLUE Bluetooth left enabled. Unlock to disable
Bluetooth left enabled. Turn on screen to disable
No Root Screen Off BT Disconnected

Action.label: bi_status values from action 2

Action.Str: unsetting fg net app flags after %pause_time%null()s
Either a voice synthesis engine isn't installed or not configured

Install a TTS engine (if none available, like Google's TTS) Test the say action with available options offered by the action's "engine:voice" arg. Edit the SAY_TTS_ENGINE_VOICE variable in the "Lazy Workflow Initializer" (action 1) with whatever worked
Wan Check Switch,Redundant Net Src,Ping Test,Net Set,Net Src Disconnected Switch,Net Unset,Net Set (User)
Wan Check Switch,Redundant Net Src,Ping Test,Net Set,Net Src Disconnected Switch,Net Unset,Net Set (User)
Toggle Data,Wan Check,Redundant Net Src Switch,Net Src Switch,Ping Test
No Root Screen Off Data Enabled

Action.label: check root

Action.Str: screen On No Lock No Low Power
screen On No Lock No Low Power
screen On No Lock No Low Power
screen On No Lock No Low Power

Action.label: (stop Automate flo) "Tasker - settings & states checks"

Action.Str: Mobile Data Var Set,Wifi Hotspot State,(Un)Set Sim Presence Airplane Mode

Action.label: Disable the profiles that have Automate dependent counter parts & itself
Action.Str: wifi var set,%xor_profile_ls(+,),%xor_profile_ls(+ via Automate,) via Automate

Action.label: Disable the profiles that have Automate dependent counter parts & itself
Action.Str: wifi var set,(Un)Set Sim Presence Airplane Mode via Automate,Mobile Data Var Set via Automate,Wifi Hotspot State

Action.label: (Automate flo) "Tasker - settings & states checks": ["Sim Presence", "Cellular Data state"]
toggle between automate (in)dependent profiles (for cellular data state)
(Automate flo) "Tasker - settings & states checks": "Cellular Data state"
toggle between automate (in)dependent profiles (for wifi hotspot state)
(Automate flo) "Tasker - settings & states checks": "Hotspot state"

Action.Str: Enable/Disable one of "Wifi Hotspot State Via Automate" or "Wifi Hotspot State" profiles or set the variable value as "enabled/disabled" in the vars section of the project (WL_HOTSPOT)

Action.label: toggle to use automate or let the profile handle the wifi connection state (for wifi connection state)
(Automate flo) "Tasker - settings & states checks": "Wifi state"
toggle between automate (in)dependent profiles

Action.Str: Re-enable "wifi var set" profile or disable it & run "Wi-Fi state" flow beginning from the "Tasker - settings & states checks" flow or set the variable "%WIFI_CONNECTED" to the appropriate value (yes/no)
Enable/Disable one of "Mobile Data Var Set" or "Mobile Data Var Set Via Automate" profiles or set the variable value as "enabled/disabled" in the vars section of the project (MDATA)

Action.label: toggle between automate (in)dependent profiles (for sim based airplane mode)

Condition.rhs: *(Un)Set Sim Presence Airplane Mode via Automate*

Action.label: (Automate flo) "Tasker - settings & states checks": "Sim Presence"

Condition.rhs: .*(Un)Set Sim Presence Airplane Mode(,| via Automate).*
.*(Un)Set Sim Presence Airplane Mode(,| via Automate).*

Action.Str: Enable/Disable one of "(Un)Set Sim Presence Airplane Mode" or "(Un)Set Sim Presence Airplane Mode via Automate" profiles

Task.pc: use say or flash based on screen & or lock state to post msgs

Action.label: (Automate flo) "Tasker - settings & states checks": "Cellular Data state"
(Automate flo) "Tasker - settings & states checks": "Sim Presence"

Condition.rhs: *(Un)Set Sim Presence Airplane Mode via Automate*

Action.label: (Automate flo) "Tasker - settings & states checks": "Hotspot state"

Condition.rhs: .*(Net Set \(User\)|Wan Check Switch|Ping Test|Redundant Net Src).*

Action.Str: if echo "%PACTIVE" | grep -q "auto set Work Profile" then for i in "$(echo "%PACTIVE" | sed 's/,/\n/g' | grep -i "auto set work profile")" do echo ,"$i" done fi

Action.label: enable sensors

Action.Str: Failed to toggle dev mode sensors

Action.label: enable sensors
enable sensors
disable sensors

Action.Str: Failed to toggle dev mode sensors

Action.label: disable sensors
disable sensors
annoy the user to unlock the phone & disable bluetooth
use only WiFi if no sim
if connection NOT made disable wifi & enable data
net src set to mdata
if connection made
disable data (if wifi connected)
set data src to wifi
do the redundant net switching when sim is available

Action.Str: No Sim. Wait 20s or until conn before disabling WiFi
disable airplane mode for redundant data usage. Only wifi used for now
No WiFi conn made after 20s. disabling

Action.label: enable data when conn not made
ivr input
